scope: Decision model, fixture suite, evaluator harness, runtime interface and runtime integration contract for MCP-callable tool authorization decisions. This is the active root spec extracted from historical Stage12 work.

historical_source.reason: The retired Stage12 root file was historical work-progress consolidation; active root specs must not be progress logs.

developer_tooling_policy.approval_required_for: integration with server runtime or MCP-exposed module/tool
developer_tooling_policy.runtime_boundary: dev tooling may support work but must not alter live server behavior without explicit approval

correction_notes: Added Step 26 current package, acceptance state, and validation evidence to _workflow/state.json.
Added recent Stage 12 decision-runtime work packages to completed_work_packages for easier manual audit.

integration_points.planned_role: HTTP/RPC entry boundary and request-envelope source
primary tools/call decision checkpoint before handler dispatch
tools/list surface invariant checkpoint without filtering unless later approved
audit enrichment bridge for decision receipts
